headline.en: Pressure-test a business model against external forces
headline.zh: 用外部力量压力测试商业模式

whyOpen.en: Use this when a BMC looks coherent internally but may fail because of trends, industry structure, market forces, or macro conditions.
whyOpen.zh: 当 BMC 内部看似合理，但可能被趋势、产业结构、市场力量或宏观条件击穿时使用。

audience.en: Teams evaluating strategy context, market assumptions, and scenario inputs.
audience.zh: 适合评估战略环境、市场假设和情景输入的团队。

firstSteps.en: Anchor the scan to one specific BMC, not the whole economy.
firstSteps.zh: 把扫描锚定到一张具体 BMC，而不是整个经济。

firstSteps.en: Separate evidence, weak signals, and assumptions.
firstSteps.zh: 区分证据、弱信号和假设。

outcomes.en: External opportunities, threats, and assumptions to test or monitor.
outcomes.zh: 一组需要测试或监测的外部机会、威胁和假设。

practicePrompts.en: Which external force would make your current revenue logic fail first?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪股外部力量会最先击穿当前收入逻辑？

business-model-canvas.en: The environment map exists to pressure-test a specific BMC. Always pair them — and revisit BME whenever the BMC changes.
business-model-canvas.zh: 环境图就是为了对一张具体的 BMC 做压力测试。两张要配对用 —— BMC 一改,环境图回头复核。
